title: File:Seabourn_Encore_at_Benoa_(1).jpg
description: Seabourn Encore, berthed at Benoa, Denpasar, Bali, Indonesia. It was taken during her maiden 10 days Singapore-to-Bali voyage.

visual_verification.method: Manual Read-tool inspection of the .webp by the operator (or operator-supervised agent), 2026-05-14
visual_verification.note: Distant view across Benoa harbour from same photographer's series; Seabourn gold shield on funnel; matches Encore-class profile and same-day series with confirmed (2) and (3)
